title: Osteoporosis follow-up

investigations.text: Defines Abu Dhabi primary-care osteoporosis screening scope, primarily for adults over 50, with follow-up and treatment-effect monitoring context.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped osteoporosis screening or follow-up identity with age and primary-care qualifiers retained.
investigations.evidence_extract: Defines Abu Dhabi primary-care osteoporosis screening scope, primarily for adults over 50, with follow-up and treatment-effect monitoring context.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

treatment_and_management.text: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports mapped fracture history, falls history, falls-risk assessment, previous DEXA, and clinician-arranged monitoring documentation.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

medication.text: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.
medication.rationale: Supports mapped calcium or vitamin D context, low-weight context, secondary causes, and family-history fields.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

follow_up.text: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.
follow_up.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-reviewed DEXA fields without assigning a diagnosis.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

source_limitations: The unrestricted follow-up workflow does not encode the source age, sex, screening, fracture-risk, or treatment-monitoring qualifiers.

Back pain or height loss, spine tenderness, kyphosis, height, calcium or vitamin D laboratory results, renal function, medicine adherence, side effects, medication or supplement plan, falls-prevention advice, bone-health advice, vitamin D supplementation, referral, generic clinician plan, fixed intervals, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, DEXA interpretation, treatment, medicine or supplement choice and dose, referral, and follow-up timing remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
